response.justification: Bogdan is a strong individual contributor with 15+ years of broad engineering experience and genuine interest in developer tooling, testing infrastructure, and CI/CD, but he has no documented people management experience and no technical lead or engineering manager titles in his history. The role's minimum requirements include 2 years of people management and 3 years of technical leadership — neither of which is evidenced anywhere in his resume. His teaching and workshop activities show mentorship instincts, but those do not substitute for the team leadership, performance management, and organizational alignment responsibilities this role demands.
strengths: Broad technical depth across web, mobile, embedded, and systems engineering spanning 15+ years
Hands-on developer tooling exposure: CI/CD infrastructure setup, test frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and MCP code generators
Active community educator with multiple workshops and a full Selenium course including TDD and CI modules
concerns: Zero people management experience documented; 2+ years is a stated minimum requirement
No technical lead or engineering manager role anywhere in a 15-year career — exclusively individual contributor titles
Developer tooling work is scattered and secondary to product work rather than a sustained 3-year primary focus
